name: SDL Mod
description: evil mod that makes your game sdl

disable-vsync.name: Disable VSync
disable-vsync.description: Allows for <cj>manual control</c> of frame timing.

uncap-framerate.name: Disable Framerate Cap
uncap-framerate.description: Removes the <cl>framerate cap</c>. This has a <co>significant</c> performance cost!

exclusive-fullscreen.name: Exclusive Fullscreen
exclusive-fullscreen.description:
Causes fullscreen mode to <cg>exclusively use</c> the display, allowing for it to <cs>draw underneath</c> display cutouts.

Exclusive fullscreen <cr>acts strangely</c> on macOS (and Geometry Dash does not properly support display cutouts), so it is <co>not recommended</c> to enable this unless you are <cd>prepared</c>.

disable-high-dpi.name: Disable High DPI Mode
disable-high-dpi.description: Disables <cp>High DPI</c> mode on <cl>Retina displays</c>, meaning the game will run at a <cr>lower resolution</c> that is then upscaled to fit the display (typically <cy>2x scale</c>). Enabling may <cg>improve performance</c> on GPU heavy levels, as well as <cj>improve scaling</c> on some overlay mods.

p3-color-space.name: Revert Color Space
p3-color-space.description:
Resets the <cd>color space</c> used on <cs>HDR displays</c> to the <cl>vanilla</c> setting, **Display P3**. This color space appears <cg>more vivid</c>, but is <cr>inaccurate</c> to the real colors.

Realistically, <co>neither</c> option is <cp>perfectly accurate</c> due to how these displays work.

use-ime.name: Enable IME
use-ime.description: Uses SDL's <cl>IME capabilities</c> for text inputs, which makes it possible to enter specific <cc>special characters</c> into text fields. Some mods <co>do not</c> handle this correctly.
